It has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health. The bioactive constituents of Asarum bletia include aristolochic acid, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Asarum bletia include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, coughs, and digestive issues.
